introduce.title: What is BatBot
introduce.label: Platform
introduce.description: BatBot maintains a composable agentic architecture. Plug in your industry's knowledge — technical docs, standards, internal data — and the platform becomes that industry's AI expert. The same system powers every vertical.

items.title: Proprietary Virtual File System
items.description: Not just storage. A structured, AI-optimized knowledge engine built ground-up for agentic retrieval. Versioned, traceable, instantly queryable.

items.title: Engineer-Facing Doc Site
items.description: The same knowledge your agent uses, surfaced for humans too. Browse, search by parameter, trace references. Engineers open it every day.

items.title: Composable Agent Layer
items.description: Agents that reason over your VFS to answer questions, generate code, recommend parts, and execute multi-step tasks. Token usage bundled per plan.

items.title: Load Data, Change Vertical
items.description: Swap the dataset, enter a new industry. No retraining. No rebuilding. The platform adapts.

benefits.title: Why Teams Choose BatBot
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: One platform investment. Unlimited domain applications.

items.title: Domain Expertise Without Domain Rebuilding
items.description: The agent architecture, VFS, and doc site are already built. You bring the data; BatBot becomes the expert.

items.title: Knowledge Humans and AI Share
items.description: Engineers use the doc site daily. The agent uses the same knowledge base. No drift, no duplication, one source of truth.

items.title: Bundled Token Pricing, No Surprises
items.description: Token usage is included with your plan. No separate API costs, no usage shock. One subscription, full capability.

usage.description: From data to deployed agent in days:

items.title: Load Your Industry Data

items.title: Auto-Structure & Index

items.title: Configure Your Agent
items.description: Set the agent's domain scope, personas, and task capabilities. Choose from chatbot, coding agent, or custom workflows.

items.title: Deploy & Iterate
items.description: Go live on your platform. Monitor usage, refine responses, expand to new data sources or verticals.

items.name: Hardware Engineer
items.quote: It feels like having a senior FAE on call. I get the datasheet answer while I'm still at my bench.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have another question? Talk to our team.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Book a demo and we'll walk you through the platform.

items.question: What makes BatBot different from a generic AI chatbot?
items.answer: BatBot is built around a proprietary virtual file system and engineer-facing doc site. The agent reasons over structured, versioned, traceable domain knowledge — not a generic index. Engineers also get a real doc site they use daily, not just a chat interface.

items.question: Can BatBot work for industries outside electronics?
items.answer: Yes. The platform is industry-agnostic. Load any vertical's documentation and the agent becomes that domain's expert. Electronics is our first production vertical; others are in progress.

items.question: What content can BatBot ingest?
items.answer: Datasheets, application notes, reference designs, standards, internal documentation, FAQs, and training materials. Custom ingestion pipelines are available for non-standard formats.

items.question: How is pricing structured?
items.answer: Token usage is bundled with your subscription plan — no per-API charges. Enterprise plans include private deployment and custom data pipeline setup.

items.question: How long does deployment take?
items.answer: A standard vertical deployment takes days, not months. Data ingestion, doc site setup, and agent configuration can be completed in a single sprint.

items.question: Is private or on-premise deployment available?
items.answer: Yes. Enterprise plans include private deployment options for data-sensitive environments.

cta.title: Ready to Deploy Your Domain Expert AI?
cta.description: Start with the electronics vertical or bring your own industry data. BatBot's platform is ready.
